title: NetOps Panorama coverage by CVE
content:
Find if there is signature coverage for a specific CVE.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (PAN-OS, xsoar-supported).

Integrations/scripts used: PanoramaCVECoverage, pan-os-get-predefined-threats-list.
raw_yaml:
id: NetOps Panorama coverage by CVE
version: -1
name: NetOps Panorama coverage by CVE
starttaskid: "0"
tasks:
  "0":
    id: "0"
    taskid: 3e896440-3bfd-4265-8d70-afc83e373905
    type: start
    task:
      id: 3e896440-3bfd-4265-8d70-afc83e373905
      version: -1
      name: ""
      iscommand: false
      description: ''
      brand: ""
    nexttasks:
      '#none#':
      - "3"
    separatecontext: false
    view: |-
      {
        "position": {
          "x": 50,
          "y": 50
        }
      }
    note: false
    timertriggers: []
    ignoreworker: false
    skipunavailable: false
    quietmode: 0
  "2":
    id: "2"
    taskid: 2d6dd63c-b9b9-419b-86a9-3fa5ad9ccdb0
    type: regular
    task:
      id: 2d6dd63c-b9b9-419b-86a9-3fa5ad9ccdb0
      version: -1
      name: Check coverage from the CVE list
      description: Check coverage from the CVE list.
      scriptName: PanoramaCVECoverage
      type: regular
      iscommand: false
      brand: ""
    scriptarguments:
      CVE_List:
        complex:
          root: incident
          accessor: cvelist
      Result_file:
        complex:
          root: File
          accessor: EntryID
    separatecontext: false
    view: |-
      {
        "position": {
          "x": 50,
          "y": 370
        }
      }
    note: true
    timertriggers: []
    ignoreworker: false
    skipunavailable: false
    quietmode: 0
  "3":
    id: "3"
    taskid: 0aa77ad6-c7bc-4f8b-84cf-3b8c9a901a7f
    type: regular
    task:
      id: 0aa77ad6-c7bc-4f8b-84cf-3b8c9a901a7f
      version: -1
      name: pan-os-get-predefined-threats-list
      description: Gets the predefined threats list from Firewall or Panorama.
      script: '|||pan-os-get-predefined-threats-list'
      type: regular
      iscommand: true
      brand: ""
    nexttasks:
      '#none#':
      - "2"
    scriptarguments:
      target:
        complex:
          root: incident
          accessor: target
    separatecontext: false
    view: |-
      {
        "position": {
          "x": 50,
          "y": 195
        }
      }
    note: false
    timertriggers: []
    ignoreworker: false
    skipunavailable: false
    quietmode: 0
view: |-
  {
    "linkLabelsPosition": {},
    "paper": {
      "dimensions": {
        "height": 415,
        "width": 380,
        "x": 50,
        "y": 50
      }
    }
  }
inputs: []
outputs: []
tests:
- No tests (auto formatted)

description: Find if there is signature coverage for a specific CVE.
